zh.lifeSummary: Agnes Bussey是Myles Bussey的女兒，於1585年出生在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾格洛比。她於大約1609年與James Heard在英國英格蘭諾福爾可結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1639年在英國戴文艾可謝特享年54歲，埋葬在英國戴文艾可謝特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Agnes Bussey是Myles Bussey的女儿，于1585年出生在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾格洛比。她于大约1609年与James Heard在英国英格兰諾福爾可结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1639年在英国戴文艾可謝特享年54岁，埋葬在英国戴文艾可謝特。

nameMeanings.name: Bussey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Norfolk, of Norman origin): habitational name from any of several places in Normandy, France: Boucé in Orne, from which came Robert de Buci mentioned in Domesday Book, Bouce (Manche), or Bucy-le-Long (Aisne). All are named with a Latin personal name Buccius (presumably a derivative of bucca ‘mouth’) + the locative suffix -acum.

variants.name: Bessey
meanings: English (Norfolk and Suffolk): perhaps a variant of   Bussey  .
French: habitational name from any of the places in Côte-d'Or and Loire named Bessey, from the Gallo-Roman estate Bassiacum, from the Roman personal name Bassius + the locative suffix -acum.

variants.name: Boosey
meanings: English: topographic name from Middle English bosy ‘ox-stall, cow-stall’ (Old English bōsig).

variants.name: Bussie
meanings: English (Lancashire): variant of   Bussey  , of Norman origin. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Bucey
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Bussey  .

variants.name: Busey
meanings: English: variant of   Bussey  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: Agnes Bussey was born in 1585, in Groby, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Myles Bussey. She married James Heard about 1609, in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1639, in Exeter, Devon, England, at the age of 54, and was buried in Exeter, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Agnes Bussey est née en 1585, à Groby, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de Myles Bussey. Elle a épousé James Heard environ 1609, à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1639, à Exeter, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterrée à Exeter, Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Agnes Bussey wurde 1585 in Groby, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, als Tochter von Myles Bussey geboren. Sie hat um 1609 in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom James Heard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1639 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Exeter, Devon, England und wurde in Exeter, Devon, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Agnes Bussey è nata il nel 1585 nel Groby, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlia di Myles Bussey. Lei sposato James Heard circa 1609, nel Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1639, nel Exeter, Devon, England, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolta a Exeter, Devon, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Busseyは1585年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアグロビーでMyles Busseyの娘として生まれた。約1609年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクでJames Heardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1639年にイギリスデボンエクセターで54歳で死去し，イギリスデボンエクセターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Bussey(은)는 1585년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 그로비에서 Myles Bussey의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1609년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 James Heard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1639년 영국 데폰 세터에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰 세터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Agnes Bussey nasceu em 1585, em Groby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filha de Myles Bussey. Ela casou-se com James Heard aproximadamente 1609, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1639, em Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra, com 54 anos, e foi sepultada em Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Agnes Bussey родилась в 1585 г. в местности гроби, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. Её отца звали Myles Bussey. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени James Heard около 1609 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1639 г. в местности эксетир, девон, Англия в возрасте 54 лет и была похоронена в местности эксетир, девон, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Agnes Bussey nació en 1585, en Groby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hija de Myles Bussey. Se casó con James Heard aproximadamente 1609, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1639, en Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultada en Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra.
